data.name: Swimmer Admiration 2
data.detailed_description:
• Narrative Exploration: Step into Aiden’s shoes as he returns with one goal: revenge. Explore a tense, secret-filled household, dig into hidden motives, and uncover what really happened between Kasumi and the people closest to her.

  • Choice and Consequence: Your decisions shape Aiden’s path. Push forward with vengeance, hesitate, forgive, manipulate—every key choice steers the story, changes how characters respond to you, and determines what ending you reach.

  • Relationship Management: Navigate a web of complicated connections with multiple key characters. Build trust, spark forbidden romance, or create lasting rivalries. Alliances shift fast—and the way you treat people can open doors… or slam them shut.

  • Unlocking Scenes: Progress through the story to unlock major turning points and explicit adult scenes that reveal deeper layers of the family’s dark secrets and the characters’ most intense emotions. Contains explicit adult content.
data.about_the_game:
• Narrative Exploration: Step into Aiden’s shoes as he returns with one goal: revenge. Explore a tense, secret-filled household, dig into hidden motives, and uncover what really happened between Kasumi and the people closest to her.

  • Choice and Consequence: Your decisions shape Aiden’s path. Push forward with vengeance, hesitate, forgive, manipulate—every key choice steers the story, changes how characters respond to you, and determines what ending you reach.

  • Relationship Management: Navigate a web of complicated connections with multiple key characters. Build trust, spark forbidden romance, or create lasting rivalries. Alliances shift fast—and the way you treat people can open doors… or slam them shut.

  • Unlocking Scenes: Progress through the story to unlock major turning points and explicit adult scenes that reveal deeper layers of the family’s dark secrets and the characters’ most intense emotions. Contains explicit adult content.
data.short_description: Play as Aiden in a choice-driven visual novel of revenge and forbidden desire. Explore dark family secrets, make fate-changing decisions, manage shifting relationships, and unlock explicit scenes as the story escalates.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
